variants.name: 绝望乌贼
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：如果与你选择的玩家邻座的玩家都是善良的，他们中毒。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the Despair Squid and have them select a player. Place the 'Poisoned' token next to each of their good-aligned neighbours. :reminder: :reminder:
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Despair Squid and have them select a player. Place the 'Poisoned' token next to each of their good-aligned neighbours. :reminder: :reminder:
